name: ai.fodda/mcp-server
title: Fodda Knowledge Graphs
description: Expert-curated knowledge graphs for AI agents. Offerings: Brand Intelligence, Deep Research, Topic Research, Earnings Intelligence, and Expert Consult — plus 30+ tools to search trends, evidence, and statistics across 220+ graphs spanning retail, beauty, sports, finance, and institutional data. Pay per task via Stripe Shared Payment Token; no account required.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token with your Fodda API key (e.g. 'Bearer sk_live_...')
